emergencyCopy.title: If you are in crisis
lines: Dial 988, then press 1 for the Veterans Crisis Line.
If this is a life-threatening emergency, call 911.
emergencyCopy.disclaimer: Numbers shown are common U.S. public resources for general information—confirm current contact options on official VA and 988 sites. This is not a substitute for emergency services or professional crisis care.
